---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem
What are you trying to do that the tool can't do today?

## Proposed solution
What you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any workarounds you're using now.

## Scope check
The v1 of this tool is deliberately small (see "Out of scope" in the README:
threads, batch export, Markdown export, settings UI, browser extension). If your
request is one of those, that's fine — say so and we'll track interest.
